Name: FInputAxisProperties
Description: Configurable properties for control axes, used to transform raw input into game ready values.

Variables.Name: DeadZone
Variables.Description: What the dead zone of the axis is.  For control axes such as analog sticks.

Variables.Name: Sensitivity
Variables.Description: Scaling factor to multiply raw value by.

Variables.Name: Exponent
Variables.Description: For applying curves to [0..1] axes, e.g. analog sticks

Variables.Name: bInvert
Variables.Description: Inverts reported values for this axis
